rationale: No conflict. The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) concerns property tax appraisal limits, while Gov't Code §2306.094 governs administration of federal homeless shelter grants. The two provisions operate in unrelated domains.
quote: The department shall administer the state's allocation of federal funds provided under the Emergency Shelter Grants Program (42 U.S.C. Section 11371 et seq.), as amended, or its successor program, and any other federal funds provided for the benefit of homeless individuals and families.
_note: No textual or operational overlap between the proposed change and the cited rule.
